title: cassinia pholidota
intro: Cassinia pholidota, also known as Rough Cassinia, is a shrub native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its small leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Cassinia pholidota include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves, and can also be used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations.
